ksa_text: Skill in designing and executing adversarial testing for AI systems, including red-teaming LLMs, testing model robustness to input perturbation, and documenting vulnerability findings.

dcwf.top_element_label: Ability to apply system design tools, methods, and techniques, including automated systems analysis and design tools.

eu_ai_act.top_element_label: Obligations of providers of GPAI models with systemic risk

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: AI systems are evaluated for trustworthy characteristics.

top_anchors.element_label: AI systems are evaluated for trustworthy characteristics.
Obligations of providers of GPAI models with systemic risk
Ability to apply system design tools, methods, and techniques, including automated systems analysis and design tools.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RM-S-003 (RM, Skill) maps to Digital Evaluator scope as weak fit. Composite score 0.5428 clears the weak fit threshold of 0.52. Top framework anchors: nist_ai_rmf=0.543, eu_ai_act=0.524, dcwf=0.408. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within digital program evaluation, performance analytics, and evidence-based assessment.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: weak fit domain KSA RM-S-003 with composite 0.5428 was preliminarily included, but the KSA text contains no direct analytics-domain signals. Internal consistency requires this to be re-examined against ANL scope.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.rebuttal: Composite 0.5428 above the weak_fit threshold of 0.52 but absence of analytics terminology in the RM domain text means the signal is framework-incidental rather than role-specific. Exclusion is more internally consistent with ANL scope definition.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include overturned. RM domain KSA with no analytics text signals at composite 0.5428 does not survive internal consistency review. Revised to exclude.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does RM-domain KSA RM-S-003 (composite 0.5428) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: RM domain content (AI governance, security/privacy, risk management, compliance) is not a primary expectation in IC-to-senior-IC ANL roles per COSO ERM framework; risk competencies in IC ANL scope limited to data risk identification, not enterprise risk management. Composite 0.5428 confirms weak signal. Exclusion consistent with published ANL frameworks.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms RM domain KSA at composite 0.5428 is not a standard requirement for Digital Evaluator at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P3 internal consistency. Final decision: exclude. Composite 0.5428, domain RM. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
